params.name: Book of the Dead
params.description:
On Jun 22, 1370 BC, the Book of the Dead was placed in a tomb along the Nile.
This Book of the Dead is found in the grave of Yani, buried along with its owner. To this day, Yani's version is the most well-preserved of all the Book of the Dead discovered and has the most spectacular content, which narrates how a dead person explores the underworld and returns to the mortal world. The Book of the Dead often records its owner's life experience to help him/her prepare for God's judgment. The Book …
